findings.title: Phase 0 restart instruction only names the non-canonical council command
findings.evidence: The Phase 0 hard-block message tells users to restart with `/deep:ask-ai-council [arguments]`, while the same entrypoint declares canonical attached mode syntax as `/speckit:deep-council:auto` and `/speckit:deep-council:confirm` at line 92 and uses `/speckit:deep-council` in the execution-mode table at lines 340-342.
findings.recommendation: Update the restart block to use the canonical `/speckit:deep-council[:auto|:confirm] [arguments]` form, or explicitly list both supported aliases while preserving the mode suffix semantics.
findings.scopeProof: Bounded to the Phase 0 failure message and command-name references inside the reviewed ask-ai-council entrypoint.
